title: Guillque's Enhanced Suspicious
description: Vanilla-friendly customs textures for suspicious stew and brown mooshroom
body:
# Make your stew more appetizing !

**Guillque's Enhanced Suspicious** adds custom textures for **Suspicious Stew** and the **Brown Mooshroom** that produces it!

_WIP: In the future, I plan to make the brown Mooshroom's skin change automatically. For now, you’ll need to rename them using nametags (which also have custom textures!)._

To give a **brown mooshroom** a custom texture, rename it based on the potion effect:

**Fire Resistance** → Allium cow
**Blindness** → Azure Bluet (and Open Eyeblossom) cow
**Saturation** → Dandelion (and Blue Orchid) cow
**Nausea** → Closed Eyeblossom cow
**Jump Boost** → Cornflower cow
**Poison** → Lily of the Valley cow
**Regeneration** → Oxeye Daisy cow
**Night Vision** → Poppy (and Torchflower) cow
**Weakness** → Tulips cow
**Wither** → Wither Rose cow
 

Need [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)
